facts.claim: Allure of the Seas is one of the most awarded cruise ships with awards ranging from best onboard entertainment to best family-friendly activities. There’s never been a showstopper quite like Allure.
Allure of the Seas is an Oasis-class cruise ship owned and operated by Royal Caribbean International.
The Oasis class ships were the largest passenger vessels in service until 2024, when the Icon-class ship, Icon of the Seas, surpassed them to become the world's largest cruise ship.
Allure is 50 millimetres (2.0 in) longer than her sister ship Oasis of the Seas, though both were built to the same specifications.
The keel of Allure of the Seas was laid on 2 December 2008, shortly after the shipyard had been acquired by STX Europe.
